summary.en: Whatnot is the largest U.S. livestream shopping marketplace, connecting buyers and sellers across collectibles, fashion, and more.
summary.zh: Whatnot 是美國最大的直播購物平台，串連買家與賣家交易收藏品、時尚、球鞋等各類商品。

highlight.en: One of YC's breakout consumer winners, Whatnot pioneered livestream commerce in the West. Its October 2025 Series F raised $225M at an $11.5B valuation, with over $6B in annual GMV.
highlight.zh: Whatnot 是 YC 最成功的消費型新創之一，在西方市場開創直播電商。2025 年 10 月 F 輪募資 2.25 億美元、估值達 115 億美元，年度商品交易總額超過 60 億美元。

funding.en: Last valued ~$11.5B (Series F, Oct 2025); raised >$700M total, $6B+ annual GMV
funding.zh: 最新估值約 115 億美元（2025 年 10 月 F 輪）；累計募資超過 7 億美元，年度 GMV 逾 60 億美元

founders: Grant LaFontaine, Logan Head, Aidan Powell

sources.title: Whatnot Lands $225M Series F, More Than Doubles Valuation to $11.5B
Livestream shopping app Whatnot raises $265M, valuation nearly $5B

summary.en: H1 runs a global data platform mapping every healthcare professional and organization to connect the healthcare ecosystem.
summary.zh: H1 經營全球醫療數據平台，盤點每一位醫療專業人員與機構，串連整個醫療生態系。

highlight.en: H1 became a leading healthcare data play among YC startups, used by pharma and medical device firms. It raised a $100M Series C led by Altimeter in 2021 and a fresh $40M round led by CVS Health Ventures.
highlight.zh: H1 成為 YC 新創中領先的醫療數據公司，獲製藥與醫療器材廠商採用。2021 年由 Altimeter 領投 1 億美元 C 輪，近期再獲 CVS Health Ventures 領投 4,000 萬美元。

funding.en: Valued ~$773M; raised $123M Series C plus a later $40M round led by CVS Health Ventures
funding.zh: 估值約 7.73 億美元；C 輪募資 1.23 億美元，後續再由 CVS Health Ventures 領投 4,000 萬美元

sources.title: H1 Inc. - Wikipedia
H1 secures $40M from CVS

summary.en: Orange Health Labs is India's fastest at-home diagnostics service, offering 30-minute sample collection and 6-hour reports.
summary.zh: Orange Health Labs 是印度最快的到府檢驗服務，提供 30 分鐘採檢與 6 小時內出報告。

highlight.en: Backed by Accel, General Catalyst, YC, and Amazon, Orange Health became one of India's most loved diagnostics brands. It has raised ~$47M, including a Series B extension in December 2024 with Amazon's Sambhav fund.
highlight.zh: 獲 Accel、General Catalyst、YC 與 Amazon 支持，Orange Health 成為印度最受喜愛的檢驗品牌之一。累計募資約 4,700 萬美元，含 2024 年 12 月 Amazon Sambhav 基金參與的 B 輪延伸。

funding.en: Raised ~$47M across 4 rounds; Series A led by YC and Accel, Series B led by Bertelsmann India
funding.zh: 累計募資約 4,700 萬美元、共 4 輪；A 輪由 YC 與 Accel 領投，B 輪由 Bertelsmann India 領投

sources.title: Orange Health - Tracxn Company Profile
Orange Health Labs raises $30Mn Series C

summary.en: Zip is an intake-to-procure platform giving any employee a single front door to request, approve, and manage B2B spend.
summary.zh: Zip 是一套 intake-to-procure 採購平台，讓所有員工透過單一入口發起、核准並管理企業 B2B 支出。

highlight.en: Zip became a YC unicorn by reinventing enterprise procurement orchestration. Its October 2024 $190M Series D, the largest procurement-tech round in over two decades, valued it at over $2.2B.
highlight.zh: Zip 重塑企業採購流程協作，成為 YC 獨角獸。2024 年 10 月 1.9 億美元 D 輪是逾二十年來採購科技最大募資，估值超過 22 億美元。

funding.en: Last valued ~$2.2B (Series D, Oct 2024); raised $358M+ total
funding.zh: 最新估值約 22 億美元（2024 年 10 月 D 輪）；累計募資超過 3.58 億美元

sources.title: Procurement Startup Zip Valued at $2.2 Billion After $190M Round
Zip raises $190 million in Series D funding

summary.en: MarketForce built a super-app for African neighbourhood merchants to source inventory, accept payments, and resell digital services.
summary.zh: MarketForce 打造非洲社區商家的超級 App，協助補貨、收款並轉售數位服務。

highlight.en: A high-profile African YC startup, MarketForce raised $42.5M in 2022 at a $100M+ valuation and served 270,000 merchants at peak. After a funding crunch, it wound down its RejaReja B2B e-commerce arm in 2024 and pivoted to social commerce.
highlight.zh: MarketForce 曾是備受矚目的非洲 YC 新創，2022 年以逾 1 億美元估值募得 4,250 萬美元，高峰服務 27 萬商家。資金緊縮後於 2024 年關閉 RejaReja B2B 電商業務，轉向社交電商。

funding.en: Raised $42.5M (incl. $40M Series A debt-equity in 2022 at $100M+ valuation); B2B arm wound down 2024
funding.zh: 累計募資 4,250 萬美元（含 2022 年以逾 1 億美元估值的 4,000 萬美元 A 輪股債）；B2B 業務於 2024 年結束

sources.title: MarketForce winds down its B2B e-commerce arm
MarketForce exits three markets, launches social commerce spinout

summary.en: Momence is scheduling, payments, and marketing software for fitness studios, gyms, and wellness businesses.
summary.zh: Momence 是為健身工作室、健身房與健康事業打造的排程、支付與行銷軟體。

highlight.en: Momence grew to serve over 4,500 fitness and wellness businesses after launching in 2020. It was acquired by Clubessential Holdings (backed by Battery Ventures and Silver Lake) in January 2025.
highlight.zh: Momence 自 2020 年創立後成長至服務逾 4,500 家健身與健康事業，並於 2025 年 1 月被 Clubessential Holdings（由 Battery Ventures 與 Silver Lake 支持）收購。

funding.en: Acquired by Clubessential Holdings in January 2025 (deal terms undisclosed)
funding.zh: 2025 年 1 月被 Clubessential Holdings 收購（交易金額未揭露）

sources.title: Clubessential Holdings Acquires SaaS Platform Momence
Momence Joins Clubessential Holdings

summary.en: Skio is subscription management software for direct-to-consumer brands selling on Shopify.
summary.zh: Skio 是為 Shopify 上 DTC 品牌打造的訂閱管理軟體。

highlight.en: Skio became a capital-efficient YC success in Shopify's ecosystem, reaching $32M ARR on just $8M raised. It delivered a $105M cash exit for its team and investors.
highlight.zh: Skio 在 Shopify 生態系中以高資本效率成為 YC 成功案例，僅募資 800 萬美元便達成 3,200 萬美元 ARR，最終以 1.05 億美元現金被收購。

funding.en: $105M cash exit; $32M ARR on just $8M raised
funding.zh: 1.05 億美元現金退場；僅募資 800 萬美元即達 3,200 萬美元 ARR

summary.en: SafeBase is a Trust Center platform that lets security teams automate and scale customer security reviews and questionnaires.
summary.zh: SafeBase 是 Trust Center 平台，讓資安團隊自動化並規模化處理客戶資安審查與問卷。

highlight.en: Used by over 1,000 organizations including OpenAI, Twilio, and CrowdStrike, SafeBase became the category leader in trust centers. Compliance automation firm Drata acquired it for $250M in February 2025.
highlight.zh: SafeBase 獲逾 1,000 家組織採用，包括 OpenAI、Twilio 與 CrowdStrike，成為信任中心領域龍頭。合規自動化公司 Drata 於 2025 年 2 月以 2.5 億美元收購。

funding.en: Acquired by Drata for $250M in February 2025
funding.zh: 2025 年 2 月被 Drata 以 2.5 億美元收購

sources.title: Security compliance firm Drata acquires SafeBase for $250M
Drata to Acquire SafeBase in $250 Million Deal

summary.en: Pardes Biosciences developed oral antiviral drugs to treat and prevent viral infections such as COVID-19.
summary.zh: Pardes Biosciences 開發口服抗病毒藥物，用於治療與預防 COVID-19 等病毒感染。

highlight.en: Pardes went public via a SPAC merger in December 2021, raising ~$274M. After its lead COVID antiviral failed a Phase 2 trial in 2023, it was acquired by MediPacific for $2.13 per share plus contingent value rights.
highlight.zh: Pardes 於 2021 年 12 月透過 SPAC 合併上市，募得約 2.74 億美元。其主力新冠抗病毒藥於 2023 年二期試驗失敗後，被 MediPacific 以每股 2.13 美元加或有價值權利收購。

funding.en: IPO via SPAC (Dec 2021) raised ~$274M; acquired by MediPacific in 2023 at $2.13/share plus CVRs
funding.zh: 2021 年 12 月經 SPAC 上市募得約 2.74 億美元；2023 年被 MediPacific 以每股 2.13 美元加或有價值權利收購

founders: Uri Lopatin, Lee Arnold, Brian Kearney

sources.title: Pardes Biosciences to be Acquired by MediPacific
Pardes Biosciences To Be Acquired By MediPacific

summary.en: Redcliffe Labs is one of India's largest omni-channel diagnostics platforms, offering 3,600+ tests via at-home collection.
summary.zh: Redcliffe Labs 是印度最大的全通路檢驗平台之一，透過到府採檢提供逾 3,600 項檢測。

highlight.en: Redcliffe scaled to 200+ cities and 70+ labs with same-day reports, processing 250K+ test parameters daily. It raised a $42M Series C led by LeapFrog Investments in September 2024, lifting total funding to ~$116M.
highlight.zh: Redcliffe 擴展至逾 200 個城市、70 多座實驗室並當日出報告，每日處理逾 25 萬項檢測參數。2024 年 9 月由 LeapFrog Investments 領投 4,200 萬美元 C 輪，累計募資約 1.16 億美元。

funding.en: Raised ~$116M total; $42M Series C led by LeapFrog Investments (Sept 2024)
funding.zh: 累計募資約 1.16 億美元；2024 年 9 月由 LeapFrog Investments 領投 4,200 萬美元 C 輪

founders: Dheeraj Jain, Aditya Kandoi, Ashish Dubey

sources.title: Redcliffe Lifetech raises $61mn; LeapFrog Investments leads
Redcliffe Labs - Tracxn Company Profile

summary.en: Zepto delivers groceries in 10 minutes across India via a network of optimized micro-warehouses known as dark stores.
summary.zh: Zepto 透過一張優化的微型倉庫（dark store）網絡，在印度提供 10 分鐘雜貨外送。

highlight.en: Founded by teenage Stanford dropouts, Zepto became one of YC and India's most prominent quick-commerce unicorns. Its October 2025 $450M round led by CalPERS valued it at $7B, with ~1.7M daily orders.
highlight.zh: 由史丹佛輟學的少年創辦，Zepto 成為 YC 與印度最受矚目的即時電商獨角獸之一。2025 年 10 月由 CalPERS 領投 4.5 億美元，估值達 70 億美元，每日訂單約 170 萬筆。

funding.en: Last valued ~$7B (Oct 2025); raised ~$2.9B+ total, ~1.7M daily orders
funding.zh: 最新估值約 70 億美元（2025 年 10 月）；累計募資逾 29 億美元，每日訂單約 170 萬筆

sources.title: Zepto raises $450M at $7B valuation
Zepto (company) - Wikipedia

summary.en: Tractian builds integrated hardware, software, and AI to monitor industrial assets and eliminate manufacturing downtime.
summary.zh: Tractian 結合硬體、軟體與 AI 監控工業設備，消除製造業停機時間。

highlight.en: Tractian emerged as a leading industrial AI player from YC, bringing predictive maintenance to asset-heavy factories. It raised a $120M Series C led by Sapphire Ventures in December 2024, taking total funding past $183M.
highlight.zh: Tractian 是 YC 出身的工業 AI 領導者，為重資產工廠帶來預測性維護。2024 年 12 月由 Sapphire Ventures 領投 1.2 億美元 C 輪，累計募資逾 1.83 億美元。

funding.en: Raised ~$183M total; $120M Series C led by Sapphire Ventures (Dec 2024)
funding.zh: 累計募資約 1.83 億美元；2024 年 12 月由 Sapphire Ventures 領投 1.2 億美元 C 輪

sources.title: Manufacturing AI Startup Tractian Locks Up $120M Series C
Tractian Raises $120M to Eliminate Industrial Downtime Worldwide
